name: handcrafted-haven-team14
description: Handcrafted Haven is an innovative web application that aims to provide a platform for artisans and crafters to showcase and sell their unique handcrafted items. It serves as a virtual marketplace, connecting talented creators with potential customers who appreciate the beauty and quality of handmade products.
author: Herzan Carcache, Levi Omagbemi, Rocio Maryorie Apaza Paricahua, Lawrence Okon, Eseoghene Jacob Gbunoghene
